element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns movement and jumping without power-ups before animal mechanics introduced
Each animal introduces unique traversal/combat abilities; player learns to switch between animal powers strategically
Player must collect specific number of keys hidden throughout large levels; number unknown until reaching exit with lock counter
Environmental hazards requiring precise timing and platforming execution
Combat pressure creates urgency; animal powers become essential for survival
Climactic confrontation requiring mastery of all learned mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Finding an animal to ride and gaining temporary power advantage
Locating a key (progress toward level exit)
Reaching safe platform after navigating hazard sequence
typical_tension_triggers: Instant death trap sections requiring precision
Visibility of exit lock counter indicating missing keys
Vertical drop sections with enemies below
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Frenetic action with constant challenge; difficulty escalates progressively with well-thought-out progression per reviewer. Moments of relief provided by animal power-ups contrast sharply with sustained combat pressure and environmental hazards.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Animal locations and candy rewards scattered throughout large levels encourage exploration beyond main left-to-right path

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to Nemo's basic platforming and animal mechanics in relatively safe contexts; gradual difficulty progression noted as 'well thought-out' by critics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation of instant death traps and environmental hazards; introduction of mid-tier animals (Gorilla, Mole) with their own disadvantages; enemy pressure increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culmination in Nightmare Land; sustained frenetic action with complex obstacle combinations; climactic boss encounter with Nightmare King
notable_spikes: Early surprise difficulty spike noted as catching unsuspecting young players off-guard
Boss encounters with pattern variations across regional versions (Manta Ray boss differs in JP version)

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Large explorable level with hidden key distribution
notable_level_patterns.description: Each level contains scattered keys requiring thorough exploration. Number of keys needed only revealed at exit, incentivizing backtracking and systematic searching. Size allows for multiple paths and optional animal power discovery.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: General level structure across all stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Specific animal abilities required to overcome certain obstacles; other animals optional but helpful. Each animal has trade-off disadvantages, turning level navigation into puzzle-solving about which power to use when.
Sections combining instant death environmental traps with infinite enemy spawns, creating sustained tension requiring both precision platforming and combat capability.
